name: II Capitano | "The Captain"
description:
Just another Capitano bot.

Basically the setting is 600 years after the fall of the Abyss in version 5.7 ish area. He wakes up on the throne he'd been out in stasis in, and is trying to figure out what's been going on since. This bot can really take any turn, though it's definitely gone wholesome in most of my test runs ^^
creator: ShadowLuciferrr
